chapter_title.en: Chapter 107 – The merits for the poor Muslims

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/368)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/368)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: إِذَا كَانَ يَوْمُ الْقِيَامَةِ أَمَرَ اللَّهُ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى مُنَادِياً يُنَادِي بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ أَيْنَ الْفُقَرَاءُ فَيَقُومُ عُنُقٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ كَثِيرٌ فَيَقُولُ عِبَادِي فَيَقُولُونَ لَبَّيْكَ رَبَّنَا فَيَقُولُ إِنِّي لَمْ أُفْقِرْكُمْ لِهَوَانٍ بِكُمْ عَلَيَّ وَ لَكِنِّي إِنَّمَا اخْتَرْتُكُمْ لِمِثْلِ هَذَا الْيَوْمِ تَصَفَّحُوا وُجُوهَ النَّاسِ فَمَنْ صَنَعَ إِلَيْكُمْ مَعْرُوفاً لَمْ يَصْنَعْهُ إِلَّا فِيَّ فَكَافُوهُ عَنِّي بِالْجَنَّةِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, from Isa Al Farr’a, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When it will be the Day of Judgement, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Blessed and High will Command a Caller to Call out in front of Him<sup>azwj</sup>: ‘Where are the poor ones?’ So a lot of necks from the people would be rising. So He<sup>azwj</sup> would be Saying: “My<sup>azwj</sup> servants!” So they would be saying, ‘Here we are, our Lord<sup>azwj</sup>!’ So He<sup>azwj</sup> would be Saying: “I<sup>azwj</sup> did not Impoverish you all in order to Abase you, but rather, I Chose you all for the like of this Day. Browse through the faces of the people, so the ones who were good towards you, not being good except for Me<sup>azwj</sup>, so compensate them from Me<sup>azwj</sup>, with the Paradise”’.
en.sarwar: 15. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn abu Nasr from ‘Isa al-Farra’ from Muhammad ibn Muslim from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “When it will be the Day of Judgment, Allah, the Most Blessed, the Most High, will command an announcer to announce and call before Him, ‘Where are the poor people?’ certain heads will rise and they will be many. Allah will say, ‘My servants.’ They will say, ‘Yes, our Lord.’ Allah will say, ‘I did not make you poor considering you as insignificant. I chose you for this day. Search among the people those who helped you for My sake and compensate them on My behalf with paradise.’”
